description: Letter from Shelomo b. Yehuda to Avraham b. Sahlan, Fustat. Dating: ca. 1030 (per Gil) and ca. 1025–1051 CE based on the years when Shelomo b. Yehuda served as Gaʾon. Address on verso in Arabic and Hebrew, listing both the sender and recipient. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב משלמה בן יהודה לאברהם בן שחלאן, פוסטאט, בערך 1030.
